body: Hi Suresh, since you're planning a corporate bulk thali package, I noticed your weekday thali is doing well — 18 orders/day avg. Would you like me to explore options for a ₹299 corporate thali (food + drink) for 10+ people?
rationale: The merchant is actively planning a corporate bulk thali package, so I'm offering a relevant option for a corporate thali at ₹299.

body: Hi Padma, since you're planning a kids yoga program, did you know our summer camps have seen a 25% increase in bookings this year? Want me to draft a post for GBP and Insta carousel?
rationale: Anchor on the specific fact of 25% increase in bookings to make the message relevant and compelling, and ask an open-ended question to encourage Padma to share her thoughts and ideas.

body: Hi Aditya, this is Karim's Salon. Your appointment is tomorrow at 10:00 AM. Please arrive 15 minutes prior. We'll be doing a keratin treatment for you. If you have any hair concerns or questions, feel free to share. See you tomorrow!
rationale: Friendly reminder with appointment details and an opportunity for the customer to share any concerns or questions.

body: Hi Riya, just a friendly reminder that you have an appointment tomorrow at Beauty Lounge by Renu. Please arrive 10 minutes prior to your scheduled time. We'll be doing a hair spa treatment for you. If you have any prep work, please let us know beforehand. Looking forward to seeing you tomorrow!
rationale: Friendly reminder with prep work details to ensure a smooth experience for the customer.

body: Hi Ramesh, summer demand is shifting: ORS + sunscreen up 40%, cold/cough down 60%. Move ORS + sunscreen to counter visibility; cold/cough to back shelf. Want to confirm?
rationale: Triggered by summer demand shift, aiming to prompt merchant action on shelf rearrangement

body: Dr. Meera, IDA Delhi's webinar on Digital Impressions on 2026-05-02 is a great opportunity to stay updated on the latest CAD/CAM workflow ROI for solo practices. Worth attending?
rationale: Triggered by CDE opportunity for dentists, leveraging Dr. Meera's interest in whitening and aligners, and emphasizing the value of staying updated in the field.

body: Hi Mr. Sharma, your chronic medication refill for metformin, atorvastatin, and telmisartan is due soon. Would you like us to deliver it to your doorstep?
rationale: Triggered by chronic_refill_due event with urgency level 3, aiming to remind the customer about the upcoming refill and offer doorstep delivery

body: Hi Dr. Sameer, Vivaan's chronic medication refill is likely due. Please check your records for the next refill window.
rationale: Patient's chronic medication refill is likely due, prompting the merchant to check their records for the next refill window.

body: Dr. Meera, Smile Studio opened nearby. To stay ahead, consider adding more photos of your clinic & staff to your Google listing. This will help patients visualize your practice. Want to do this?
rationale: Loss-aversion lever: 'stay ahead', 'consider adding' to nudge action; effort-externalization: 'want to do this' to make it easy for the merchant

body: Hi Suresh, a new restaurant opened nearby. To stay ahead, consider adding more photos of your dishes on Zomato to increase visibility by 24% in Tier-1 cities. Want to do this?
rationale: Loss-aversion lever: 'stay ahead' and 'increase visibility' to motivate action; differentiator action: adding photos to increase visibility

body: Bridal season is starting — bookings usually 2x normal in next 4 weeks. What's your strategy for this mini-season?
rationale: Starting a conversation to gauge merchant's preparedness for the upcoming bridal season

body: Hi Suresh, what's the most popular offer among your customers this month?
rationale: Starting a conversation to understand customer preferences and offer performance

body: Hi Rashmi, we noticed you haven't visited us in 57 days. Your weight loss journey is just as important as ever. Would you like to book a FREE trial class to get back on track?
rationale: Re-engagement message with a specific offer to re-ignite customer interest, leveraging customer's previous focus on weight loss.

body: Hi Reyansh, it's been a while since your last visit on 1st April. We've got a special offer for you - Dental Cleaning @ ₹299. Would you like to book an appointment?
rationale: Re-engagement message with a specific offer to encourage the customer to book an appointment.

body: Hi Reyansh, it's been a while since you last visited Daily Care Medicos. We've got a new offer for you - Free Home Delivery on orders over ₹499. Would you like to take advantage of this?
rationale: Re-engagement message with a relevant offer to encourage the customer to visit the pharmacy again.

body: Hi Anjali, what's been the most-asked service at Glamour Lounge Spa & Salon this week?
rationale: Re-engaging the merchant with a curiosity-driven question to revive conversation

body: Hi Anand, what's been the most-asked service at Chai Point Cafe this week?
rationale: Re-engaging the merchant with a curiosity-driven question to revive conversation

body: Diwali's around the corner (31st Oct). Want me to draft a Diwali-themed post or campaign for your salon?
rationale: Festival-themed content can boost engagement and attract new customers. This is a heads-up to plan ahead.

body: Diwali is just around the corner (Oct 22nd). Want me to draft a Diwali-themed post or campaign for Bend & Burn? It could be a fun way to engage with your members and attract new ones.
rationale: The merchant is approaching a festival season, and a themed post or campaign can help attract new customers and engage existing ones.

body: Hi Vikas, your pharmacy's unverified Google Business Profile (GBP) is affecting 30% more customers from finding you online. Verify it now via postcard or phone call to boost visibility.
rationale: The trigger indicates the merchant's GBP is unverified, which may impact online visibility. The message aims to prompt the merchant to verify their GBP to improve their online presence.

body: Hi Suresh, DC vs MI match tonight at Arun Jaitley Stadium. Your 'Buy 1 Pizza Get 1 Free' offer on Tue-Thu is a winner. Should we push it for tonight's match?
rationale: Given the IPL match tonight, we're suggesting to promote the existing offer to capitalize on the increased footfall.

body: Hi Suresh, Mylari South Indian Cafe has reached 145 reviews! You're among Top 3 in Indiranagar for consistent quality. Next milestone: 150 reviews. To get there, focus on improving weekend service to reduce negative reviews.
rationale: Celebrating milestone, providing social proof, and actionable advice to reach the next milestone.

body: Hi Mukesh, Aapke 500th customer par aapne ek bada milestone jeet liya hai! Top 3 restaurants Aundh mein yah achievement karne ke baad hi thali delivery offer launch karte hain. Aap kya sochte hain aapke next milestone ke liye?
rationale: Celebrating milestone achievement with social proof and encouraging merchant to think about next milestone.

body: Dr. Bharat, calls dropped 50% in the last week. Your baseline is 12 calls. Consider activating the 'Free Consultation' offer to boost engagement. Will this help? yes_stop
rationale: Empathetic tone with a specific metric (calls) and delta (-50%), followed by a concrete fix (offer activation) and a binary CTA to gauge merchant's willingness to act.

body: Hi Sushma, your calls have dropped by 6 in the last 30 days. To boost bookings, consider activating the 'Haircut @ ₹99' offer. Would you like to activate it?
rationale: The 'Haircut @ ₹99' offer is a low-cost, high-visibility service that can help attract new customers and boost bookings.

body: Hi Padma, congrats on 18 calls last week! This momentum won't last if you don't capitalize on it. Should we activate the 'Free Body Composition Analysis' offer to convert these leads?
rationale: Celebrating the performance spike, then pivoting to a specific action to capitalize on the momentum, using loss-aversion to encourage the merchant to take action.

body: Heads up: your views/calls just spiked 20% in a week! This window won't last, so let's capitalize on this momentum by setting up home delivery for customers. Will you enable it today?
rationale: Loss-aversion lever to prompt action, followed by a specific action to capitalize on the momentum.

body: Priya, aapki 6 mahine ki cleaning ki date aayi hai. Aapko 5 November ko 6 baje ya 6 November ko 5 baje ke slot mein aana hoga. Kya aapko yeh slot pasand hai?
rationale: The message is in the customer's preferred language (hi-en mix) and includes the specific service due (6 month cleaning) and available slots. The CTA is open-ended to allow the customer to confirm their preferred slot.

body: Hi Diya, hope you're doing well! Your PT sessions are due this week. We have slots available on Wednesday and Friday, 7-9 pm. Would you like to book one?
rationale: The message is a friendly reminder of the customer's upcoming PT sessions, with a specific offer of available slots to book.

body: Dr. Meera, DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective Dec 15. Max dose per IOPA exposure drops from 1.5 mSv to 1.0 mSv. Audit your X-ray setup before Dec 15; document E-speed or RVG in your SOPs. Want to confirm you're prepared?
rationale: Triggered by compliance regulation change; using peer tone to inform merchant of deadline and required action
